TEXT.citation: Wikipedia contributors. (2026). Sakizaya Wikipedia. Wikimedia Foundation. Retrieved 2026-06-09, from https://szy.wikipedia.org/
TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_szy, title = {Sakizaya Wikipedia}, author = {{Wikipedia contributors}}, year = {2026}, publisher = {Wikimedia Foundation}, url = {https://szy.wikipedia.org/}, urldate = {2026-06-09} }

S.FORM: == Ke-lai-ke-li.Pin-ka-se ś†ľťõ∑śąąťáĆ¬∑ŚĻ≥Ść°śĖĮ == malatusa kina sapiput tu siwawaan a kawawan hina biyaw tu tademaw anu tadayadah tu kabiyaalawan a kitakidan, u sapikuwan tu tademaw a sapayuan, ya kawaw nida maadih nu mita, sakay pisumadan tu nikalaledian nu talecawaan a kawawan caay ka siwantan, nika sakasilahecian tu. saan ku tademaw tu sabaw lima a mihcaan, Amilika misauayaw tina laledian nu kawawan mapalekal ku wawies. cen-ce, sakaudip atu siykay kanca malalid kina nipiwawiesan, nika sakaetiman nina kawawan u sapiputaw tu wawa a sapayuan. hida satu tu nikasibilian a talaw nu balucu' tu hatidaay nu tataynaan i nu ayawan atu nikudan nu pikikungan a nikalaledian nu sakaetiman a kawawan, pahemek sa ku tatayna patideng tu taneng malaledi' acaay ka biyalaw tu nika siwawaan, nika sumadan nu liklikan kanca masumad tu ku wayway nu tademaw. . saan ku tademaw u Yi-mia-nuo-tun " nika lahecian a sapiput tu wawaan a sapayu" a nika lahecian caay kaw hatidaay ka saetiman, dayhan yu mahida idaw tu ku kapahay a sapiputaw tu wawa a sapayuan. uyni a sapiputaw tu wawaan a sapayuan itini i kawawan atu balucuay a kawawan u malatusay. itini i nu ayawan nu Yi-mia-nuo-tu kalahecian, " sikawaway a tademaw" hina patahekalan a sapiputaw tu wawaan u sakay sawawaan a tupelan. sawawaan a tupelan u sakapahay sa, nu hatidaay tu nu tataynaan caay namin ka namuh micukaymas. mamizuyi kita, misuayaw kita pikinkiwan tina sapiputaw a sapayuan, pinaay nu tatayna a tademawan mangalay mitahaw micukaymas tina caayay henay nu nipitanaman a sapiputaw tu laliwawaan nu kawawan, caay ka ngadah micukaymas tu nanikinkiwan tu kapahay a kawawan. . saan ku tademaw u Yi-mia-nuo-tun a nipalikalan caay ka kakasenengan nu mita, anu micukaymas kita mila'cus tu udip sa, saan anu sadikuda anu cay tu katenes amisabaluhay, u sakapahay a sapayuan atu duma nu duguan tu sapipaliyun. nika sipakayda i kawawan, sakay putan tu laliwawaan a kawaw nu adidiay a nikalahatan, ina Yi-mia-nuo-tun manamuh tu namin ku katuuday. ini i likisian saan u lima a bataan a Yi-mia-nuo-tun anikalahecian u sapiputaw tu wawa a pabalucuan. . yadah tu ku papatinakuay tu mahiniay a ta'mulen nanay a sapipu'taw tu sakacaay ka siwawa mahiniay nu sapayuan a sakay pisangaan a kawawan i caysiw limsep mihcaan malingatu, tawya Amilika senwu syecia ci Ke-lei-ke-li. Pin-ka-se malingatu mikinkiw tina cudadan. alaw ni kiyakuan tu sasiwawa a patidengay ci Ma-ke-li-te'. San-ke ku misiluday musakamu ci nidan tina sapikinkiwan a kakawawan, caay tu ci nida pakatepa tu mahiniay a tademawan, ci Pin-ka-se u Ce-cun-lai sakay udip atu aadupen nu laliwawaan u matinengay a tademaw, u Ma-sa-cu-se'-se-lu-se-puo-li-wu-se tu kakinkiwan tu cilekayan cicenhua nu cuzen. matinengay tu sakay tataynaan nu sitangahay a tademaw ci Ye-han.Lu-ke puose. sipakayni nu nakamuan ni Pin-ka-se a nisakamuan palutatenga tu tatamulen tu hua-ti-tun taneng miput tu sakabulad nu tataynaan a nikinkiwan. nikinkiwan ni Luo-ke' taneng patinaku tu hua-ti-tun tatamulen nanay tu sapiputaw tu sasawawaan micukaymas idaw ku tusaay a pihacengay nu kawawan. sayaway, kiya 85% a dimiadan miput tu sakabulad. Sakatusa , anu namukantu a caay tu ka yadah ku nika tu sapayuan. . nika ci Pin-ka-se palutatenga ci nida tu kawaw nida, caay tu piales. matineng ci nida idaw ku dumaay atu hua-ti-tun a sakalecad nu hua-syean nika nai' ku sakala'cus a hua-he-wu. . sipakayda i pabaw maadih nu mitaŚĺěšłäŤŅįť°ĮÁĄ∂ŚŹĮšĽ•ÁúčŚáļ sapiputaw tu laliwawaan a sapayuan caay kaw ni Ke-lei-ke-li.Pin-ka-se nu nika cacay a milaheci, tatengan u ci Fuo-lan-ke'.Ke-e-tun kina milaheciay tu Cin-mia-nuo-tun. katinengan ci Ke-e-tun atu katuuday pasayda namin cinidaan tu nikalahecian nu nipadadanan, masineng ku nuheni. itida i ci Pi-ka-se mikuliay a katuuday nu dumaan a tademawan, pasu Ye-han.Luo-ke', Cen-min-cu atu ci Say-e-suo-la-man. Cia-si-ya puose idaw ku nipacuwahan. namakayni, ci Lay-se-lei. Ma-ke-li-te'.San-ke atu nisakamuwan nu maku a tademawan idaw namin ku nipacuwahay, nika u hamin ni adihan, ci Ke-lei-ke-li u tada micuduhay tina kawawan nu tademaw, cinida ku micuduhay tina ka kinkiwan a kawawan. . idaw ku ni kinkiwan micuduh pakasilaheci a miadih atu misabalucu', ci nida makatatu u tada makataay tu a sakasenengan a tademaw. caysiw sipsip mihcaan miedap patideng tu Wu-se-ta' ka kinkiwan tu cilekay a ci-cen-hu', hida satu malaci-cen-hu' a kakinkiwan nu cozen. ci Pin-ka-se maseneng tu yadahay nu kesyean, nika ci nida atu milabuay tu sapiputaw tu pilecuhan nu wawaan a tademaw caay namin pakaala tu Nuo-pei-e a kawlahan. ci Pin-ka-se i caysiw nempic Puo-se-tun mapatay, caay ka tineng ku katuuday, caay ka tinengi nu kesyecia. sisa ci nida i tini nu tademawan idaw ku satabakiay nu lahecian a mitadasay nu tademawan. . www.newton.com.tw/wiki/%E6%A0%BC%E9%9B%B7%E6%88%88%E9%87%8C%C2%B7%E5%B9%B3%E5%8D%A1%E6%96%AF
S.PHON: == k…ô-r~…ĺai-k…ô-r~…ĺi.pin-ka-s…ô ******** == mar~…ĺatusa kina sapiput tu siwawaan a kawawan ńßina bijaw tu tad…ômaw anu tadajadańß tu kabijaar~…ĺawan a kitakidan, u sapikuwan tu tad…ômaw a sapajuan, ja kawaw nida maadińß nu mita, sakaj pisumadan tu nikar~…ĺar~…ĺ…ôdian nu tar~…ĺ…ô ¶awaan a kawawan ¶aaj ka siwantan, nika sakasir~…ĺańß…ô ¶ian tu. saan ku tad…ômaw tu sabaw r~…ĺima a mińß ¶aan, amir~…ĺika misauajaw tina r~…ĺar~…ĺ…ôdian nu kawawan mapar~…ĺ…ôkar~…ĺ ku wawi…ôs. ¶…ôn- ¶…ô, sakaudip atu sijkaj kan ¶a mar~…ĺar~…ĺid kina nipiwawi…ôsan, nika saka…ôtiman nina kawawan u sapiputaw tu wawa a sapajuan. ńßida satu tu nikasibir~…ĺian a tar~…ĺaw nu bar~…ĺu ¶u Ē~ ° tu ńßatidaaj nu tatajnaan i nu ajawan atu nikudan nu pikikuŇčan a nikar~…ĺar~…ĺ…ôdian nu saka…ôtiman a kawawan, pańß…ôm…ôk sa ku tatajna patid…ôŇč tu tan…ôŇč mar~…ĺar~…ĺ…ôdi Ē~ ° a ¶aaj ka bijar~…ĺaw tu nika siwawaan, nika sumadan nu r~…ĺikr~…ĺikan kan ¶a masumad tu ku wajwaj nu tad…ômaw. . saan ku tad…ômaw u ji-mia-nuo-tun " nika r~…ĺańß…ô ¶ian a sapiput tu wawaan a sapaju" a nika r~…ĺańß…ô ¶ian ¶aaj kaw ńßatidaaj ka sa…ôtiman, dajńßan ju mańßida idaw tu ku kapańßaj a sapiputaw tu wawa a sapajuan. ujni a sapiputaw tu wawaan a sapajuan itini i kawawan atu bar~…ĺu ¶uaj a kawawan u mar~…ĺatusaj. itini i nu ajawan nu ji-mia-nuo-tu kar~…ĺańß…ô ¶ian, " sikawawaj a tad…ômaw" ńßina patańß…ôkar~…ĺan a sapiputaw tu wawaan u sakaj sawawaan a tup…ôr~…ĺan. sawawaan a tup…ôr~…ĺan u sakapańßaj sa, nu ńßatidaaj tu nu tatajnaan ¶aaj namin ka namuńß mi ¶ukajmas. mamizuji kita, misuajaw kita pikinkiwan tina sapiputaw a sapajuan, pinaaj nu tatajna a tad…ômawan maŇčar~…ĺaj mitańßaw mi ¶ukajmas tina ¶aajaj ńß…ônaj nu nipitanaman a sapiputaw tu r~…ĺar~…ĺiwawaan nu kawawan, ¶aaj ka Ňčadańß mi ¶ukajmas tu nanikinkiwan tu kapańßaj a kawawan. . saan ku tad…ômaw u ji-mia-nuo-tun a nipar~…ĺikar~…ĺan ¶aaj ka kakas…ôn…ôŇčan nu mita, anu mi ¶ukajmas kita mir~…ĺa Ē~ ° ¶us tu udip sa, saan anu sadikuda anu ¶aj tu kat…ôn…ôs amisabar~…ĺuńßaj, u sakapańßaj a sapajuan atu duma nu duguan tu sapipar~…ĺijun. nika sipakajda i kawawan, sakaj putan tu r~…ĺar~…ĺiwawaan a kawaw nu adidiaj a nikar~…ĺańßatan, ina ji-mia-nuo-tun manamuńß tu namin ku katuudaj. ini i r~…ĺikisian saan u r~…ĺima a bataan a ji-mia-nuo-tun anikar~…ĺańß…ô ¶ian u sapiputaw tu wawa a pabar~…ĺu ¶uan. . jadańß tu ku papatinakuaj tu mańßiniaj a ta Ē~ °mur~…ĺ…ôn nanaj a sapipu Ē~ °taw tu saka ¶aaj ka siwawa mańßiniaj nu sapajuan a sakaj pisaŇčaan a kawawan i ¶ajsiw r~…ĺims…ôp mińß ¶aan mar~…ĺiŇčatu, tawja amir~…ĺika s…ônwu sj…ô ¶ia ¶i k…ô-r~…ĺ…ôi-k…ô-r~…ĺi. pin-ka-s…ô mar~…ĺiŇčatu mikinkiw tina ¶udadan. ar~…ĺaw ni kijakuan tu sasiwawa a patid…ôŇčaj ¶i ma-k…ô-r~…ĺi-t…ô Ē~ °. san-k…ô ku misir~…ĺudaj musakamu ¶i nidan tina sapikinkiwan a kakawawan, ¶aaj tu ¶i nida pakat…ôpa tu mańßiniaj a tad…ômawan, ¶i pin-ka-s…ô u ¶…ô- ¶un-r~…ĺai sakaj udip atu aadup…ôn nu r~…ĺar~…ĺiwawaan u matin…ôŇčaj a tad…ômaw, u ma-sa- ¶u-s…ô Ē~ °-s…ô-r~…ĺu-s…ô-puo-r~…ĺi-wu-s…ô tu kakinkiwan tu ¶ir~…ĺ…ôkajan ¶i ¶…ônńßua nu ¶uz…ôn. matin…ôŇčaj tu sakaj tatajnaan nu sitaŇčańßaj a tad…ômaw ¶i j…ô-ńßan.r~…ĺu-k…ô puos…ô. sipakajni nu nakamuan ni pin-ka-s…ô a nisakamuan par~…ĺutat…ôŇča tu tatamur~…ĺ…ôn tu ńßua-ti-tun tan…ôŇč miput tu sakabur~…ĺad nu tatajnaan a nikinkiwan. nikinkiwan ni r~…ĺuo-k…ô Ē~ ° tan…ôŇč patinaku tu ńßua-ti-tun tatamur~…ĺ…ôn nanaj tu sapiputaw tu sasawawaan mi ¶ukajmas idaw ku tusaaj a pińßa ¶…ôŇčaj nu kawawan. sajawaj, kija **% a dimiadan miput tu sakabur~…ĺad. sakatusa , anu namukantu a ¶aaj tu ka jadańß ku nika tu sapajuan. . nika ¶i pin-ka-s…ô par~…ĺutat…ôŇča ¶i nida tu kawaw nida, ¶aaj tu piar~…ĺ…ôs. matin…ôŇč ¶i nida idaw ku dumaaj atu ńßua-ti-tun a sakar~…ĺ…ô ¶ad nu ńßua-sj…ôan nika nai Ē~ ° ku sakar~…ĺa Ē~ ° ¶us a ńßua-ńß…ô-wu. . sipakajda i pabaw maadińß nu mita********* sapiputaw tu r~…ĺar~…ĺiwawaan a sapajuan ¶aaj kaw ni k…ô-r~…ĺ…ôi-k…ô-r~…ĺi.pin-ka-s…ô nu nika ¶a ¶aj a mir~…ĺańß…ô ¶i, tat…ôŇčan u ¶i fuo-r~…ĺan-k…ô Ē~ °.k…ô-…ô-tun kina mir~…ĺańß…ô ¶iaj tu ¶in-mia-nuo-tun. katin…ôŇčan ¶i k…ô-…ô-tun atu katuudaj pasajda namin ¶inidaan tu nikar~…ĺańß…ô ¶ian nu nipadadanan, masin…ôŇč ku nuńß…ôni. itida i ¶i pi-ka-s…ô mikur~…ĺiaj a katuudaj nu dumaan a tad…ômawan, pasu j…ô-ńßan.r~…ĺuo-k…ô Ē~ °, ¶…ôn-min- ¶u atu ¶i saj-…ô-suo-r~…ĺa-man. ¶ia-si-ja puos…ô idaw ku nipa ¶uwańßan. namakajni, ¶i r~…ĺaj-s…ô-r~…ĺ…ôi. ma-k…ô-r~…ĺi-t…ô Ē~ °.san-k…ô atu nisakamuwan nu maku a tad…ômawan idaw namin ku nipa ¶uwańßaj, nika u ńßamin ni adińßan, ¶i k…ô-r~…ĺ…ôi-k…ô-r~…ĺi u tada mi ¶uduńßaj tina kawawan nu tad…ômaw, ¶inida ku mi ¶uduńßaj tina ka kinkiwan a kawawan. . idaw ku ni kinkiwan mi ¶uduńß pakasir~…ĺańß…ô ¶i a miadińß atu misabar~…ĺu ¶u Ē~ °, ¶i nida makatatu u tada makataaj tu a sakas…ôn…ôŇčan a tad…ômaw. ¶ajsiw sipsip mińß ¶aan mi…ôdap patid…ôŇč tu wu-s…ô-ta Ē~ ° ka kinkiwan tu ¶ir~…ĺ…ôkaj a ¶i- ¶…ôn-ńßu Ē~ °, ńßida satu mar~…ĺa ¶i- ¶…ôn-ńßu Ē~ ° a kakinkiwan nu ¶oz…ôn. ¶i pin-ka-s…ô mas…ôn…ôŇč tu jadańßaj nu k…ôsj…ôan, nika ¶i nida atu mir~…ĺabuaj tu sapiputaw tu pir~…ĺ…ô ¶uńßan nu wawaan a tad…ômaw ¶aaj namin pakaar~…ĺa tu nuo-p…ôi-…ô a kawr~…ĺańßan. ¶i pin-ka-s…ô i ¶ajsiw n…ômpi ¶ puo-s…ô-tun mapataj, ¶aaj ka tin…ôŇč ku katuudaj, ¶aaj ka tin…ôŇči nu k…ôsj…ô ¶ia. sisa ¶i nida i tini nu tad…ômawan idaw ku satabakiaj nu r~…ĺańß…ô ¶ian a mitadasaj nu tad…ômawan. . www.n…ôwton. ¶om.tw/wiki/%…ô*%a*%b ¶%…ô*%*b%b*%…ô*%**%**%…ô*%**%* ¶% ¶*%b*%…ô*%b*%b*%…ô*%*d%a*%…ô*%**%af
S.FORM: == Ke-lai-ke-li.Pin-ka-se ś†ľťõ∑śąąťáĆ¬∑ŚĻ≥Ść°śĖĮ == malatusa kina sapiput tu siwawaan a kawawan hina biyaw tu tademaw anu tadayadah tu kabiyaalawan a kitakidan, u sapikuwan tu tademaw a sapayuan, ya kawaw nida maadih nu mita, sakay pisumadan tu nikalaledian nu talecawaan a kawawan caay ka siwantan, nika sakasilahecian tu. saan ku tademaw tu sabaw lima a mihcaan, Amilika misauayaw tina laledian nu kawawan mapalekal ku wawies. cen-ce, sakaudip atu siykay kanca malalid kina nipiwawiesan, nika sakaetiman nina kawawan u sapiputaw tu wawa a sapayuan. hida satu tu nikasibilian a talaw nu balucu' tu hatidaay nu tataynaan i nu ayawan atu nikudan nu pikikungan a nikalaledian nu sakaetiman a kawawan, pahemek sa ku tatayna patideng tu taneng malaledi' acaay ka biyalaw tu nika siwawaan, nika sumadan nu liklikan kanca masumad tu ku wayway nu tademaw. . saan ku tademaw u Yi-mia-nuo-tun " nika lahecian a sapiput tu wawaan a sapayu" a nika lahecian caay kaw hatidaay ka saetiman, dayhan yu mahida idaw tu ku kapahay a sapiputaw tu wawa a sapayuan. uyni a sapiputaw tu wawaan a sapayuan itini i kawawan atu balucuay a kawawan u malatusay. itini i nu ayawan nu Yi-mia-nuo-tu kalahecian, " sikawaway a tademaw" hina patahekalan a sapiputaw tu wawaan u sakay sawawaan a tupelan. sawawaan a tupelan u sakapahay sa, nu hatidaay tu nu tataynaan caay namin ka namuh micukaymas. mamizuyi kita, misuayaw kita pikinkiwan tina sapiputaw a sapayuan, pinaay nu tatayna a tademawan mangalay mitahaw micukaymas tina caayay henay nu nipitanaman a sapiputaw tu laliwawaan nu kawawan, caay ka ngadah micukaymas tu nanikinkiwan tu kapahay a kawawan. . saan ku tademaw u Yi-mia-nuo-tun a nipalikalan caay ka kakasenengan nu mita, anu micukaymas kita mila'cus tu udip sa, saan anu sadikuda anu cay tu katenes amisabaluhay, u sakapahay a sapayuan atu duma nu duguan tu sapipaliyun. nika sipakayda i kawawan, sakay putan tu laliwawaan a kawaw nu adidiay a nikalahatan, ina Yi-mia-nuo-tun manamuh tu namin ku katuuday. ini i likisian saan u lima a bataan a Yi-mia-nuo-tun anikalahecian u sapiputaw tu wawa a pabalucuan. . yadah tu ku papatinakuay tu mahiniay a ta'mulen nanay a sapipu'taw tu sakacaay ka siwawa mahiniay nu sapayuan a sakay pisangaan a kawawan i caysiw limsep mihcaan malingatu, tawya Amilika senwu syecia ci Ke-lei-ke-li. Pin-ka-se malingatu mikinkiw tina cudadan. alaw ni kiyakuan tu sasiwawa a patidengay ci Ma-ke-li-te'. San-ke ku misiluday musakamu ci nidan tina sapikinkiwan a kakawawan, caay tu ci nida pakatepa tu mahiniay a tademawan, ci Pin-ka-se u Ce-cun-lai sakay udip atu aadupen nu laliwawaan u matinengay a tademaw, u Ma-sa-cu-se'-se-lu-se-puo-li-wu-se tu kakinkiwan tu cilekayan cicenhua nu cuzen. matinengay tu sakay tataynaan nu sitangahay a tademaw ci Ye-han.Lu-ke puose. sipakayni nu nakamuan ni Pin-ka-se a nisakamuan palutatenga tu tatamulen tu hua-ti-tun taneng miput tu sakabulad nu tataynaan a nikinkiwan. nikinkiwan ni Luo-ke' taneng patinaku tu hua-ti-tun tatamulen nanay tu sapiputaw tu sasawawaan micukaymas idaw ku tusaay a pihacengay nu kawawan. sayaway, kiya 85% a dimiadan miput tu sakabulad. Sakatusa , anu namukantu a caay tu ka yadah ku nika tu sapayuan. . nika ci Pin-ka-se palutatenga ci nida tu kawaw nida, caay tu piales. matineng ci nida idaw ku dumaay atu hua-ti-tun a sakalecad nu hua-syean nika nai' ku sakala'cus a hua-he-wu. . sipakayda i pabaw maadih nu mitaŚĺěšłäŤŅįť°ĮÁĄ∂ŚŹĮšĽ•ÁúčŚáļ sapiputaw tu laliwawaan a sapayuan caay kaw ni Ke-lei-ke-li.Pin-ka-se nu nika cacay a milaheci, tatengan u ci Fuo-lan-ke'.Ke-e-tun kina milaheciay tu Cin-mia-nuo-tun. katinengan ci Ke-e-tun atu katuuday pasayda namin cinidaan tu nikalahecian nu nipadadanan, masineng ku nuheni. itida i ci Pi-ka-se mikuliay a katuuday nu dumaan a tademawan, pasu Ye-han.Luo-ke', Cen-min-cu atu ci Say-e-suo-la-man. Cia-si-ya puose idaw ku nipacuwahan. namakayni, ci Lay-se-lei. Ma-ke-li-te'.San-ke atu nisakamuwan nu maku a tademawan idaw namin ku nipacuwahay, nika u hamin ni adihan, ci Ke-lei-ke-li u tada micuduhay tina kawawan nu tademaw, cinida ku micuduhay tina ka kinkiwan a kawawan. . idaw ku ni kinkiwan micuduh pakasilaheci a miadih atu misabalucu', ci nida makatatu u tada makataay tu a sakasenengan a tademaw. caysiw sipsip mihcaan miedap patideng tu Wu-se-ta' ka kinkiwan tu cilekay a ci-cen-hu', hida satu malaci-cen-hu' a kakinkiwan nu cozen. ci Pin-ka-se maseneng tu yadahay nu kesyean, nika ci nida atu milabuay tu sapiputaw tu pilecuhan nu wawaan a tademaw caay namin pakaala tu Nuo-pei-e a kawlahan. ci Pin-ka-se i caysiw nempic Puo-se-tun mapatay, caay ka tineng ku katuuday, caay ka tinengi nu kesyecia. sisa ci nida i tini nu tademawan idaw ku satabakiay nu lahecian a mitadasay nu tademawan. . www.newton.com.tw/wiki/%E6%A0%BC%E9%9B%B7%E6%88%88%E9%87%8C%C2%B7%E5%B9%B3%E5%8D%A1%E6%96%AF

sapajuan, ja kawaw nida maadińß nu mita, sakaj pisumadan tu nikar~…ĺar~…ĺ…ôdian nu tar~…ĺ…ô ¶awaan a kawawan ¶aaj ka siwantan, nika sakasir~…ĺańß…ô ¶ian tu. saan ku tad…ômaw tu sabaw r~…ĺima a mińß ¶aan, amir~…ĺika misauajaw tina r~…ĺar~…ĺ…ôdian nu kawawan mapar~…ĺ…ôkar~…ĺ ku wawi…ôs. ¶…ôn- ¶…ô, sakaudip atu sijkaj kan ¶a mar~…ĺar~…ĺid kina nipiwawi…ôsan, nika saka…ôtiman nina kawawan u sapiputaw tu wawa a sapajuan. ńßida satu tu nikasibir~…ĺian a tar~…ĺaw nu bar~…ĺu ¶u Ē~ ° tu ńßatidaaj nu tatajnaan i nu ajawan atu nikudan nu pikikuŇčan a nikar~…ĺar~…ĺ…ôdian nu saka…ôtiman a kawawan, pańß…ôm…ôk sa ku tatajna patid…ôŇč tu tan…ôŇč mar~…ĺar~…ĺ…ôdi Ē~ ° a ¶aaj ka bijar~…ĺaw tu nika siwawaan, nika sumadan nu r~…ĺikr~…ĺikan kan ¶a masumad tu ku wajwaj nu tad…ômaw. . saan ku tad…ômaw u ji-mia-nuo-tun " nika r~…ĺańß…ô ¶ian a sapiput tu wawaan a sapaju" a nika r~…ĺańß…ô ¶ian ¶aaj kaw ńßatidaaj ka sa…ôtiman, dajńßan ju mańßida idaw tu ku kapańßaj a sapiputaw tu wawa a sapajuan. ujni a sapiputaw tu wawaan a sapajuan itini i kawawan atu bar~…ĺu ¶uaj a kawawan u mar~…ĺatusaj. itini i nu ajawan nu ji-mia-nuo-tu kar~…ĺańß…ô ¶ian, " sikawawaj a tad…ômaw" ńßina patańß…ôkar~…ĺan a sapiputaw tu wawaan u sakaj sawawaan a tup…ôr~…ĺan. sawawaan a tup…ôr~…ĺan u sakapańßaj sa, nu ńßatidaaj tu nu tatajnaan ¶aaj namin ka namuńß mi ¶ukajmas. mamizuji kita, misuajaw kita pikinkiwan tina sapiputaw a sapajuan, pinaaj nu tatajna a tad…ômawan maŇčar~…ĺaj mitańßaw mi ¶ukajmas tina ¶aajaj ńß…ônaj nu nipitanaman a sapiputaw tu r~…ĺar~…ĺiwawaan nu kawawan, ¶aaj ka Ňčadańß mi ¶ukajmas tu nanikinkiwan tu kapańßaj a kawawan. . saan ku tad…ômaw u ji-mia-nuo-tun a nipar~…ĺikar~…ĺan ¶aaj ka kakas…ôn…ôŇčan nu mita, anu mi ¶ukajmas kita mir~…ĺa Ē~ ° ¶us tu udip sa, saan anu sadikuda anu ¶aj tu kat…ôn…ôs amisabar~…ĺuńßaj, u sakapańßaj a sapajuan atu duma nu duguan tu sapipar~…ĺijun. nika sipakajda i kawawan, sakaj putan tu r~…ĺar~…ĺiwawaan a kawaw nu adidiaj a nikar~…ĺańßatan, ina ji-mia-nuo-tun manamuńß tu namin ku katuudaj. ini i r~…ĺikisian saan u r~…ĺima a bataan a ji-mia-nuo-tun anikar~…ĺańß…ô ¶ian u sapiputaw tu wawa a pabar~…ĺu ¶uan. . jadańß tu ku
